name: Swipe Carousel
description: A clean, swipeable carousel with minimal styling that showcases content through smooth horizontal navigation. Perfect for professional service firms and modern businesses displaying product features, client testimonials, or key capabilities.

descriptions.descriptive: Clean horizontal scrolling interface with smooth swipe gestures and subtle navigation dots. Features generous white space, typography-focused cards, and understated transitions that prioritize content readability over flashy effects.
descriptions.usage: Displays multiple content pieces like product highlights, feature overviews, or customer testimonials in a space-efficient format. Users can browse through items at their own pace without overwhelming page real estate.
descriptions.audienceFit: Ideal for SaaS platforms, consulting firms, or professional services that value clear communication over visual drama. Appeals to decision-makers who appreciate organized information presentation and streamlined user experiences.
